# SceneView — 3D & AR SDK

> SceneView is an open-source SDK for building 3D and AR experiences.
> Android (Jetpack Compose + Filament) and Apple (SwiftUI + RealityKit).

## Quick Links
- Documentation: https://sceneview.github.io/
- GitHub: https://github.com/SceneView/sceneview
- API Reference: https://sceneview.github.io/api/
- Full API (machine-readable): https://sceneview.github.io/llms-full.txt
- Quickstart Android: https://sceneview.github.io/quickstart/
- Quickstart iOS: https://sceneview.github.io/quickstart/#ios
- Samples: https://sceneview.github.io/samples/
- Playground: https://sceneview.github.io/playground/
- Changelog: https://sceneview.github.io/changelog/
- npm MCP: https://www.npmjs.com/package/sceneview-mcp

## Install
Android: implementation("io.github.sceneview:sceneview:3.3.0")
iOS: .package(url: "https://github.com/SceneView/SceneViewSwift.git", from: "3.3.0")
